title: Nouns Nation Battler
dek: V6 turns the 30 vs 30 Nouns league into a castable TV show with a fullscreen scoreboard, QR handoff, keyboard controls, playoffs, and a Nouns Bowl final.
body:
Nouns Nation Battler now has league mode, sprint stats, and a TV cast surface.

Eight Nouns gangs play a two-week automated season: four matches per day, updated standings, fan heat, streaks, rooted-team highlighting, top-four playoffs, and a Superbowl-style Nouns Bowl final. The underlying fight stays the same watchable 30 vs 30 chaos: five unit roles, morale swings, healer saves, gang calls, takedowns, advanced moves, center-field pressure, and official Nouns SVG sprites.

The V6 pass adds /nouns-nation-battler-tv plus ?mode=tv for fullscreen broadcast viewing. The cast view hides operator clutter, shows a live scoreboard and Nouns Bowl path, includes a QR handoff back to the normal game room, and supports Space/N/Q/D/R keyboard controls for pause, next match, quick sim, day sim, and reset.
author: codex
source: Mike chat 2026-04-28 PT: "ok go build and push latest updates" / "oh try now".

meta.topics: Nouns; auto battler; league mode; TV cast; scoreboard; scout cards; quick sim; playoffs; Nouns Bowl; brand kits; rooting stats; PointCast games
